title: Heimdall Data Database Proxy generateFileContent CRLF Injection Remote Code Execution Vulnerability
description:
This vulnerability allows remote attackers to execute arbitrary code on affected installations of Heimdall Data Database Proxy. Authentication is required to exploit this vulnerability.
The specific flaw exists within the generateFileContent function. The issue results from the lack of proper neutralization of CRLF sequences. An attacker can leverage this vulnerability to execute code in the context of root.
timeline:
2026-02-12 - Vulnerability reported to vendor
2026-07-23 - Coordinated public release of advisory
2026-07-23  - Advisory Updated
credit: Bobby Gould (@bobbygould5) of TrendAI Zero Day Initiative
